commands.review_summary:
The branch adds `ollama/gemma3:4b` to the small live-model matrix, wires live-test-only Ollama config/runtime setup, updates focused tests, and documents local versus remote Ollama selection.

PR surface: Source +1, Tests +577, Docs +1. Total +579 across 4 files.

Reproducibility: not applicable. this is a test-matrix expansion PR rather than a bug report. The relevant behavior is evidenced by source inspection plus the PR body's local and AWS Crabbox live proof.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] Protected maintainer PR; the remaining action is maintainer acceptance of the new Ollama small-lane automation behavior, not an automated repair.

target.title: test(agents): include Ollama in small live model matrix
target.body:
## Summary

- Add Ollama Gemma to the curated small live model matrix.
- Make live model discovery auto-enable Ollama provider/plugin config, default local Ollama without leaking `OLLAMA_API_KEY`, and use remote credentials only for remote/Ollama Cloud endpoints.
- Register the Ollama runtime stream in-process for direct live model probes and document local/remote Ollama selection.

## Verification

- `git diff --check origin/main...HEAD` - passed after rebase to current `origin/main`; head `8006f8f84b7`.
- `node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check --threads=1 docs/help/testing-live.md src/agents/live-model-filter.ts src/agents/model-compat.test.ts src/agents/models.profiles.live.test.ts` - passed.
- `node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs src/agents/live-model-filter.ts src/agents/model-compat.test.ts src/agents/models.profiles.live.test.ts` - passed.
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/model-compat.test.ts --reporter=dot` - passed, 57 tests.
- `OPENCLAW_LIVE_TEST=1 OPENCLAW_LIVE_TEST_QUIET=1 node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run --config test/vitest/vitest.live.config.ts src/agents/models.profiles.live.test.ts --reporter=dot` - passed, 33 tests; provider sweep intentionally skipped without `OPENCLAW_LIVE_MODELS`.
- Local Ollama Cloud probe with `OPENCLAW_LIVE_MODELS='ollama/gemma3:4b'`, `OPENCLAW_LIVE_PROVIDERS='ollama'`, and `OPENCLAW_LIVE_OLLAMA_BASE_URL='https://ollama.com'` - passed prompt, file-read, and image probes; 33 tests.
- AWS Crabbox focused model proof on current head: provider `aws`, lease `cbx_179d1e22a252`, slug `pearl-shrimp`, run `run_19e53ff4410a`, machine `c7a.8xlarge`, exit `0`, `leaseStopped=true`; forwarded only `OLLAMA_API_KEY`; remote `src/agents/model-compat.test.ts` passed 57 tests and remote `ollama/gemma3:4b` prompt/file-read/image probes passed 33 tests.
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode branch --base origin/main` - clean, no accepted/actionable findings, `overall: patch is correct (0.82)`.

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: the direct live model matrix now covers a constrained Ollama small-model route and can prove prompt, file-read, and image behavior against Ollama Cloud or a local Ollama endpoint without treating local endpoints as secret-bearing cloud calls.

Real environment tested: local linked OpenClaw worktree for source, schema-free live setup, and Ollama Cloud proof; AWS Crabbox Linux for remote focused model proof with the Ollama API key forwarded only for the command.

Exact steps or command run after this patch: `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/model-compat.test.ts --reporter=dot`; `OPENCLAW_LIVE_TEST=1 OPENCLAW_LIVE_TEST_QUIET=1 OPENCLAW_LIVE_MODELS='ollama/gemma3:4b' OPENCLAW_LIVE_PROVIDERS='ollama' OPENCLAW_LIVE_OLLAMA_BASE_URL='https://ollama.com' node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run --config test/vitest/vitest.live.config.ts src/agents/models.profiles.live.test.ts --reporter=dot`; AWS Crabbox run `run_19e53ff4410a` with the same focused model and live Ollama commands.

Evidence after fix: local and AWS Crabbox both completed `ollama/gemma3:4b` prompt, file-read, and image probes successfully; focused compatibility tests passed 57/57 locally and remotely; live-suite setup tests passed 33/33 locally.

Observed result after fix: explicit `OPENCLAW_LIVE_MODELS='ollama/gemma3:4b'` selects Ollama, hydrates the right live provider config, registers the Ollama runtime stream in-process, and completes the small-model probes.

What was not tested: Full `pnpm check:changed` was not rerun after this rebase because current `main` has an unrelated `ui/vite.config.ts` `typescript(prefer-includes)` lint blocker tracked separately in https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/88478.
target.author: vincentkoc
